mnemonics: FIRE for Flow Control: For loops, If statements, Repeat loops, and Else clauses
keyPoints: Use if/else for conditional execution based on logical tests
Use for loops when you know how many iterations are needed
Use while/repeat loops when iteration depends on a condition
commonMistakes: Forgetting to initialize variables before a loop
Creating infinite loops by not updating the condition variable
Using = instead of == in logical conditions
